errors.InvalidOperationException: Something went wrong. Check your data and try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Try again in a few minutes.
errors.backgroundDataFetchFailure: Couldn't refresh the data. Reload the page to see the latest information.

stores.invalidIdAndStatus: Status ID and name are invalid.

connection.invalidUsernameOrPassword: Wrong username or password. Check your credentials.

connection.invalidRoles: Your user doesn't have the required permissions.
connection.companyLevelKey: API key is not at merchant level.

countries.noCountries: Your store doesn't have any seQura-supported selling country active. To use seQura payment methods, activate at least one supported country. Contact support if you need help.

payments.requiredFieldsError: Method ID and code are required.

generalSettings.captureDelayError: Capture delay must be between 1 and 7 days.

validation.invalidImageType: Use a supported image format (PNG, JPG, SVG).
validation.invalidTimeDuration: Use date format (2017-08-31) or duration (P3M15D = 3 months and 15 days). See ISO 8601.

payments.title: Payment methods
payments.description: See which seQura payment options are available in each country.

debug.title: Enable logs
debug.description: Helps diagnose issues with the seQura integration

removeModal.title: Delete logs
removeModal.message: Delete the logs? This can't be undone.

log.minLevelDescription: Set the minimum severity level for logs.

description.onboarding: You'll need to copy some details from the merchant portal. If you don't have an account, contact us
description.settings: Set up your seQura account and choose the environment. If you don't have an account, contact us

username.label: Username
username.description: You'll find it in the email we sent you.

password.label: Password
password.description: You'll find it in the email we sent you.

description.text: I want to help improve seQura by sending usage data

modal.title: Change environment?
modal.message: This will remove your current settings and connect you to the new environment.

disconnect.title: Disconnect
disconnect.message: Are you sure you want to disconnect?

deployments.title: Select deployment targets
deployments.description: Choose which deployment targets should offer seQura payment methods.

selector.label: Which deployment targets should offer seQura?
selector.description: Each deployment target serves a different group of countries.

countries.title: Selling countries
countries.description: Choose which countries should offer seQura payment methods.

selector.label: Which countries should offer seQura?
selector.description: Select the countries where seQura payment methods will be available. To enable more countries, contact us.

widgets.description: Widgets show your seQura payment options and how they work. They help increase average order value and conversion.

displayOnProductPage.label: Show widget on product page
displayOnProductPage.description: Display the payment method icon on the product page.

description.start: To customize styles, go to the

showInProductListing.label: Show installment amount in product listing
showInProductListing.description: Display the installment amount on product listing pages.

showInCartPage.label: Show installment amount in cart
showInCartPage.description: Display the installment amount on the cart page.

messageBelowLimit.label: Message below limit
messageBelowLimit.description: Text shown when the amount is below the minimum.

productPriceSelector.label: Price selector
productPriceSelector.description: CSS selector to get the product price.

altProductPriceSelector.label: Alternative price selector
altProductPriceSelector.description: CSS selector for special layouts (e.g. variable products).

altProductPriceTriggerSelector.label: Alternative price trigger
altProductPriceTriggerSelector.description: CSS selector that indicates when to use the alternative price selector.

defaultProductLocationSelector.label: Widget location
defaultProductLocationSelector.description: CSS selector for the widget container.

cartPriceSelector.label: Cart price selector
cartPriceSelector.description: CSS selector to get the cart total.

cartLocationSelector.label: Cart widget location
cartLocationSelector.description: CSS selector for the cart widget container.

widgetOnCartPage.label: Payment method to show
widgetOnCartPage.description: Choose which payment method to show on the cart page.

listingPriceSelector.label: Listing price selector
listingPriceSelector.description: CSS selector to get the price in product listings.

listingLocationSelector.label: Listing widget location
listingLocationSelector.description: CSS selector for the listing widget container.

widgetOnListingPage.label: Payment method to show
widgetOnListingPage.description: Choose which payment method to show on product listing pages.

orderStatusSettings.title: Order statuses
orderStatusSettings.description: Define how seQura statuses map to {shopName} order statuses. Default values work for most cases.

informCancellations.label: Inform cancellations to seQura
informCancellations.description: When you cancel an order in {{shopName}}, we'll try to cancel it in seQura too.

generalSettings.title: General settings
generalSettings.description: Configure how seQura works in your store.

showCheckoutAsHostedPage.label: Show seQura checkout as full page
showCheckoutAsHostedPage.description: Checkout opens in a full page instead of a popup.

sendOrderReports.label: Send order reports to seQura
sendOrderReports.description: Send periodic order reports to seQura.

allowedIPAddresses.label: Allowed IP addresses
allowedIPAddresses.description: Only these IPs can see and use seQura.

excludedCategories.label: Excluded categories
excludedCategories.description: These categories can't be purchased with seQura.

excludedProducts.label: Excluded products
excludedProducts.description: These products can't be purchased with seQura. Enter one SKU per product.

enabledForServices.label: Enable for services
enabledForServices.description: Your contract must allow selling services.

allowFirstServicePaymentDelay.label: Allow first service payment delay
allowFirstServicePaymentDelay.description: Allow delaying the first payment for services.

allowServiceRegistrationItems.label: Allow registration items
allowServiceRegistrationItems.description: Allow charging part of the price as upfront registration.

defaultServicesEndDate.label: Services end date
defaultServicesEndDate.description: Format: date (2017-08-31) or duration (P3M15D = 3 months and 15 days).
